summary.lv: Izklaides un pakalpojumu nozares uzņēmums (caur WorkingDay Latvia) meklē CRM datu analītiķi klientu datu analīzei un CRM platformas attīstībai.
summary.en: An entertainment and services company (via WorkingDay Latvia) seeks a CRM Data Analyst to analyze customer data and drive CRM platform development and insights.
